name: io.github.plasmate-labs/plasmate
description: Agent-native headless browser. HTML in, Semantic Object Model out. 10x token compression.

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch a web page and return its Semantic Object Model (SOM) - a structured, token-efficient representation of the page content. Use this instead of raw HTML fetching for 10x token savings.

budget.description: Maximum output tokens. SOM will be truncated to fit.

javascript.description: Enable JavaScript execution for dynamic/SPA pages. Default: true.

tools.name: extract_text
tools.description: Fetch a web page and return only the clean, readable text content. No HTML, no structure - just the text a human would read.

tools.name: open_page
tools.description: Open a web page in a persistent browser session for multi-step interaction. Returns session_id and initial SOM.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the page context and return the result.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click an element on the page by its SOM element ID. Returns updated SOM.

tools.name: close_page
tools.description: Close a browser session and free resources.
